calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:00 a.m.: This cause comes on calendar this morning for Small Claims Appeal with the Court, counsel for both sides, including Certified Law Student Mr. Cory Mickels who also appears for the Plaintiff CCSF with Deputy City Attorney Hunter W. Sims, III; Defense Counsel Edgar W. Hawkyard, Esq. is present with Defendant Jim Charles.

The Court takes the bench and hears statements presented by both sides; the Court also receives and reviews documentary evidence presented in addition to viewing a CCSF video taken of the traffic collision via a camera positioned on the Muni bus at he time of the incident that is presented by Plaintiff CCSF.

After hearing all testimony presented and after receiving and reviewing all documentary evidence in the cause, the Court thereupon takes the matter under submission. Counsel and parties are are informed they will be notified of the Court's decision by mail delivery.
PRO TEM JUDGE: ROBERT STUMPF, JR.; CLERK: MARJORIE L.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (Dept. 525).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Continued To Feb-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Judgment Entered
